conservation_statuses.authority: Livro Vermelho dos Vertebrados de Portugal

conservation_statuses.description: Rook Corvus frugilegus has most recently been assessed for The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species in 2020. Corvus frugilegus is listed as Vulnerable under criteria A2bcde+4bcde.

conservation_statuses.authority: Israel Nature and Parks Authority Red List

conservation_statuses.description: Le Corbeau freux n’apparaît de façon stable que dans quelques colonies concentrées dans la vallée de la Garonne, malgré l’existence d’autres milieux favorables. Cette localisation sur des peuplements d’arbres soumis à des interventions humaines (entretien, coupe) rend toutefois la population régionale vulnérable à une éventuelle disparition.

list.title: Berichtsgebiet Arbeitskreis Vogelschutzwarte Hamburg Check List

results.wikipedia_summary: The rook (Corvus frugilegus) is a member of the family Corvidae in the passerine order of birds. It was given its binomial name by Carl Linnaeus in 1758, The binomial is from Latin; Corvus is for "raven", and frugilegus is Latin for "fruit-gathering", from frux, frugis, "fruit", and legere, "to pick". The English name is ultimately derived from the bird's harsh call.
